title: lasianthus iteophyllus
intro: Lasianthus iteophyllus, also known as the Taiwan lasianthus, is a plant species in the family Theaceae, native to the tropical regions of Taiwan and southern China. The medicinal properties of Lasianthus iteophyllus include its antimalarial, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are found in its leaves and stems. The health benefits of this plant include its potential in treating fever, malaria, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The herbal preparations of Lasianthus iteophyllus typically involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its leaves and stems, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
